text: The bug is in C:\Users\Owner\nova\nova_backend\services\chat_service.py Error: When I send "run it" after creating a plan, Nova sometimes throws a UI send error or a backend 500. Expected: After plan creation, "run it" should advance one step or return "Step blocked." if data is missing. Actual: Sometimes the UI shows "Something went wrong sending the message."
